title: Nice Modified Bit
sourceTitle: Nice Prompt Modified Bit Midjourney 7 Promptshare
prompt: A highly detailed cinematic portrait of an elderly hooded chimpanzee cyber-sorcerer with deep wrinkles, glowing white-blue eyes, and a stern expression, wearing an ornate dark metallic hooded robe with intricate circuit-like patterns. His hands emit swirling ethereal blue energy and smoke, translucent glowing fingers outstretched. Dramatic volumetric god rays pierce the dark misty background, cool blue color grading, mysterious and ominous atmosphere, ultra-realistic, dramatic lighting. --ar 3:4 --profile 362c2i1 fey4r6j dbkgol8 6lf6sa2 9nv6snq nj4ajrt pz8oy84 --v 7
